allow.label: Sites the plugin may contact
allow.example: Add full hostnames or use *.example.com for a one-level wildcard.

allow.label: Folders the plugin may access
allow.example: List absolute paths. The plugin can only read/write inside these folders.

allowBinaries.label: Programs the plugin may run
allowBinaries.example: Type a program name (e.g. `git`) or full path. Wildcards are not allowed.
